meta.title: Governor Tom Ridge and Senator Joe Lieberman Release Biodefense Report
meta.description: Former Governor Tom Ridge and Senator Joe Lieberman released a major biodefense report, sponsored by Hudson Institute, that outlines national vulnerabilities and provides recommendations to improve U.S. defense against the use of biological weapons and naturally-occurring infectious diseases with pandemic potential.The report, titled A National Blueprint for Biodefense: Leadership and Major Reform Needed to Optimize Efforts, was developed, written and released by the Blue Ribbon Study Panel on Biodefense, which was formed to recommend changes to U.S. policy and law to strengthen national biodefense while optimizing resource investments.
